payload.answer: Slack will be the primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface now. Telegram integration is postponed.
payload.decision: Slack as primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface; Telegram integration deferred to a future phase.

entity_resolution.reason: Current project state specifies Slack as primary interface; Telegram to be added later without altering Slack role.

memory_cards.statement: Slack is designated as the primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface for Brain. Telegram integration remains planned for a later phase.

details: Memory ingestion interface established as Slack-first.
Telegram integration deferred to future workstream.
